data.title: BNB Surpasses 740 USDT with a Narrowed 0.21% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jul 19, 2025, 12:28 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 740 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 740.049988 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.21% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Data: If you buy Bitcoin with the money you use to buy a new iPhone, you’d make $242 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) Executive Chairman Michael Saylor retweeted on the X platform, saying that if you don't choose to buy an iPhone every time a new iPhone is released, but buy Bitcoin with the same selling price, the current profit may reach 242 million US dollars. The BTC price of iPhone has been used by the crypto community as a benchmark for measuring Bitcoin's purchasing power. Investors understand the value proposition of cryptocurrencies by comparing the Bitcoin price of iPhone in previous years.

data.title: Analysis: Ethereum is about to see a record short squeeze and will soon rise to $4,000
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The Kobeissi Letter said in its latest analysis released on Friday that ETH/USD will soon hit $4,000. Ethereum is currently brewing a short squeeze that is rare in crypto history. If the price rises another 10%, $1 billion worth of short positions will be liquidated. The blowup of short positions may push the price of ETH back to $4,000. Ethereum is currently priced at $3,553, and its recent price trend has been called "making history." ETH's rise has triggered a record short squeeze. Kobeissi said that as the largest altcoin by market value, Ethereum is "punishing" shorts at an extremely rare rate. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Ripple vs. SEC: Appeal Still Pending as Market Awaits SEC Vote
data.description:
The post Ripple vs. SEC case is still not fully resolved. Although Ripple announced on June 27 that it would drop its cross-appeal, the SEC has yet to officially withdraw its own appeal, keeping the case open and investors waiting
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/ripple-vs-sec-appeal-still-pending-as-market-awaits-sec-vote/

data.title: Hong Kong to Introduce Staked Ethereum ETF in 2025
data.description: According to PANews, Hong Kong is set to launch a staked Ethereum ETF later this year, following the introduction of a Bitcoin ETF. Ren Junfei, founder and CEO of licensed virtual asset management company Pandu, announced plans for the new product, which will include additional yield beyond mere spot holdings. Discussions are underway with Hong Kong regulatory authorities to address investor protection and operational aspects such as subscription and redemption processes.

data.title: Planet Evening News
Bitcoin Miner Sales Surge To Highest Level Since April – Details
data.description:
Bitcoin is currently holding above the $115,000 level after setting a new all-time high of approximately $123,000 last Monday. The price structure remains firmly bullish, with buyers still in control, but growing signs suggest the potential for a short-term correction. Momentum has slowed, and the market is entering a consolidation phase as traders reassess risk. Related Reading: Coinbase Premium Signals Aggressive Ethereum Accumulation: Institutional Demand Accelerates According to new data from CryptoQuant, Bitcoin miner selling has surged sharply
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/bitcoin-news/bitcoin-miner-sales-surge-to-highest-level-since-april-details/
